summary: The diff fully implements both requirements. The hero section background has been changed to blue using a gradient overlay (from-blue-600/90 via-blue-500/80 to-blue-700/85), and a steam iron image has been added on the right side with floating animation. All acceptance criteria are met.

hallucinated_features.description: Added floating animation for the steam iron image
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff includes @keyframes float animation and .animate-float utility class in index.css, which were not requested in the BuildRequest. The requirement only asked for a small, appropriately positioned steam iron image, not animated effects.

The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions 'Updated Tailwind configuration with enhanced shadow definitions (elegant and warm shadows with increased opacity)', which was not part of the BuildRequest requirements.
